title: PRIORITY CARE - 211info
text: PRIORITY CARE COTTAGE GROVE PRIORITY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides treatment for minor illnesses or injuries that do not require hospitalization but need direct attention. 1515 Village Drive Suite120 Cottage Grove, OR 97424 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:45am-6pm (541) 767-5540 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 767-5540 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Accepts Medicaid, Medicare, and private insurance. Sliding scale is available based on family size and income. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income if apply for sliding scale LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Urgent Care Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
